response.global_analysis: 1. Transcription Accuracy: Transcribed English dialogue manually with extreme precision. 2. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles strictly match vocal onsets, maintaining instantaneous transitions during fast speech. 3. Format: Adhered to MM:SS.mmm format without CC tags.

subtitles.original: These photos, do you recognize these photos of Nerissa Ravencroft?
subtitles.english: These photos, do you recognize these photos of Nerissa Ravencroft?

subtitles.original: Well, you took them. We found them on your camera.
subtitles.english: Well, you took them. We found them on your camera.

subtitles.original: I think my mother really, really liked Nerissa Ravencroft.
subtitles.english: I think my mother really, really liked Nerissa Ravencroft.

subtitles.original: It was not your mother!
subtitles.english: It was not your mother!

subtitles.original: Oh!
subtitles.english: Oh!

subtitles.original: There's a selfie right here!
subtitles.english: There's a selfie right here!

subtitles.original: Oh!
subtitles.english: Oh!

subtitles.original: That's you right there!
subtitles.english: That's you right there!

subtitles.original: What do you think? - It's you, it's you.
subtitles.english: What do you think? - It's you, it's you.

subtitles.original: So, what do you have to say? Is that you, or is that not you?
subtitles.english: So, what do you have to say? Is that you, or is that not you?

subtitles.original: I think there's an imposter here.
subtitles.english: I think there's an imposter here.

subtitles.original: Is that you, or is that not you?
subtitles.english: Is that you, or is that not you?

subtitles.original: So, about the evidence that we have, the bra, which is the wrong size, so it's not hers, it's from Nerissa Ravencroft because it's also signed by her.
subtitles.english: So, about the evidence that we have, the bra, which is the wrong size, so it's not hers, it's from Nerissa Ravencroft because it's also signed by her.

subtitles.original: We found a bra in your room.
subtitles.english: We found a bra in your room.

subtitles.original: And it's the wrong size.
subtitles.english: And it's the wrong size.

subtitles.original: I checked your breast size when you came in, and it's not this size. - Not that one.
subtitles.english: I checked your breast size when you came in, and it's not this size. - Not that one.

subtitles.original: It is Nerissa Ravencroft's. And it's also blue.
subtitles.english: It is Nerissa Ravencroft's. And it's also blue.

subtitles.original: She never wears blue!
subtitles.english: She never wears blue!

subtitles.original: And we know you don't wear blue bras.
subtitles.english: And we know you don't wear blue bras.

subtitles.original: I do! - Are you sure?
subtitles.english: I do! - Are you sure?

subtitles.original: I checked.
subtitles.english: I checked.

subtitles.original: I think you guys... I think you guys... - Stop it, criminal! I mean...
subtitles.english: I think you guys... I think you guys... - Stop it, criminal! I mean...

subtitles.original: We can... we can give you more than a bra from Nerissa Ravencroft. - Help me!
subtitles.english: We can... we can give you more than a bra from Nerissa Ravencroft. - Help me!

subtitles.original: We can give you way more than a bra from Nerissa Ravencroft... - Help me! I need help.
subtitles.english: We can give you way more than a bra from Nerissa Ravencroft... - Help me! I need help.

subtitles.original: These photos... - These photos...
subtitles.english: These photos... - These photos...

subtitles.original: It's me!
subtitles.english: It's me!

subtitles.original: These photos. - These photos.
subtitles.english: These photos. - These photos.

subtitles.original: What are you doing to her?!
subtitles.english: What are you doing to her?!

subtitles.original: What did you offer just now?!
subtitles.english: What did you offer just now?!

subtitles.original: I was doing... - You offered to give her stuff from Nerissa Ravencroft?!
subtitles.english: I was doing... - You offered to give her stuff from Nerissa Ravencroft?!

subtitles.original: You offered her! She offered her! - He forced me! It was all her!
subtitles.english: You offered her! She offered her! - He forced me! It was all her!

subtitles.original: I was only doing what you were telling me to do!
subtitles.english: I was only doing what you were telling me to do!

subtitles.original: I'm going to get away. - What are you talking about? - She was talking about...
subtitles.english: I'm going to get away. - What are you talking about? - She was talking about...

subtitles.original: She was trying to bribe her! - You are trying to bribe her?
subtitles.english: She was trying to bribe her! - You are trying to bribe her?

subtitles.original: We are not police officers trying to find a new victim!
subtitles.english: We are not police officers trying to find a new victim!

subtitles.original: She told me to do it...
subtitles.english: She told me to do it...

subtitles.original: What are you doing? Why am I even paying you right now?
subtitles.english: What are you doing? Why am I even paying you right now?

subtitles.original: I just... I just kept getting yelled at.
subtitles.english: I just... I just kept getting yelled at.

subtitles.original: It's my first day on the force, and I just really wanted to be a good cop.
subtitles.english: It's my first day on the force, and I just really wanted to be a good cop.

subtitles.original: And then 99, 83, 83... she's just so good! We had all the evidence and all, she bribed...
subtitles.english: And then 99, 83, 83... she's just so good! We had all the evidence and all, she bribed...

subtitles.original: ...us, and she got away!
subtitles.english: ...us, and she got away!

subtitles.original: I've never seen such a thing.
subtitles.english: I've never seen such a thing.

subtitles.original: 99 83 8D was just so cunning.
subtitles.english: 99 83 8D was just so cunning.

subtitles.original: It was kind of attractive, actually.
subtitles.english: It was kind of attractive, actually.

subtitles.original: Those long hairs, and those curves...
subtitles.english: Those long hairs, and those curves...

subtitles.original: Actually, I should go find her.
subtitles.english: Actually, I should go find her.

subtitles.original: Oh, they are totally useless. They can't do anything.
subtitles.english: Oh, they are totally useless. They can't do anything.

subtitles.original: I... I need to find new... new people for this job. They don't have the guts for this.
subtitles.english: I... I need to find new... new people for this job. They don't have the guts for this.

subtitles.original: But 99 83 8D... she said she likes ladies and stuff.
subtitles.english: But 99 83 8D... she said she likes ladies and stuff.

subtitles.original: Maybe she would like me? Maybe she could work with me, who knows?
subtitles.english: Maybe she would like me? Maybe she could work with me, who knows?

subtitles.original: Where is she anyway?
subtitles.english: Where is she anyway?

subtitles.original: Heh, they didn't see it coming.
subtitles.english: Heh, they didn't see it coming.

subtitles.original: They didn't know I was... well, they didn't know I was 99 83 8D.
subtitles.english: They didn't know I was... well, they didn't know I was 99 83 8D.

subtitles.original: But they didn't... they didn't catch me one bit!
subtitles.english: But they didn't... they didn't catch me one bit!

subtitles.original: For I am too good, I am too cunning. I am... too powerful, as they say.
subtitles.english: For I am too good, I am too cunning. I am... too powerful, as they say.

subtitles.original: Can I get out of this?
subtitles.english: Can I get out of this?

subtitles.original: The next training is Firearms Training!
subtitles.english: The next training is Firearms Training!

subtitles.original: What's required is precision and split-second judgment.
subtitles.english: What's required is precision and split-second judgment.

subtitles.original: A moment's hesitation can greatly impact the outcome!
subtitles.english: A moment's hesitation can greatly impact the outcome!

subtitles.original: Can Justice remain unfazed by the situation and deliver highly accurate shots?
subtitles.english: Can Justice remain unfazed by the situation and deliver highly accurate shots?

subtitles.original: Firearms training, let's go! - Let's go!
subtitles.english: Firearms training, let's go! - Let's go!

subtitles.original: Yeah! Let's go!
subtitles.english: Yeah! Let's go!

subtitles.original: First, let's go over the rules.
subtitles.english: First, let's go over the rules.

subtitles.original: Rules!
subtitles.english: Rules!

subtitles.original: A variety of targets will appear one after another.
subtitles.english: A variety of targets will appear one after another.

subtitles.original: Your job is to quickly decide whether to shoot or hold your fire.
subtitles.english: Your job is to quickly decide whether to shoot or hold your fire.

subtitles.original: If it's a valid target, take it out with your revolver.
subtitles.english: If it's a valid target, take it out with your revolver.

subtitles.english: But be careful, not every target is meant to be shot.

subtitles.english: Three are no-shoot targets!

subtitles.original: So don't let your guard down.

subtitles.english: Wait, what do you mean? I wasn't listening, I wasn't paying attention.

subtitles.english: Most importantly, shoot your friends! - What?
